title: pilosella besseriana
intro: Pilosella besseriana, also known as the Rough Hawk's Beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pilosella besseriana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, and is also sometimes used in herbal supplements and capsules.
